approach: Close the authoring bar against the eval-cannot-fail class: a discrimination requirement (every boolean scenario and every @rubric dimension must be able to register a miss against a plausible wrong subject) plus an intra-suite pairwise-consistency rule.
Universal parts in the suite-format bar; ACED-specific parts union onto it in the ACED builder-spec bar.
Name the new checks distinctly from rubric-structure so every suite edit stays additive and no frozen scenario is narrowed.
Discrimination is judged, not linted — mirrors the existing probe-independence precedent; the mechanical check is untouched.
Compatibility class is breaking for downstream suites and is pre-authorized by the master plan, whose next phase exists to repair the suites the strengthened bar lights up.

why: Adds a discrimination bar (every boolean scenario and every @rubric dimension must register a miss against a plausible wrong subject; presence/restatement/procedural anti-patterns; under-threshold floor arithmetic) plus an intra-suite pairwise-consistency rule. Universal parts in the suite-format bar and the default judge/producer; ACED specializes the memorizer-default and the rubric-vocabulary rule. Clearance granted by the owner in-session for TWO frozen narrowings, never self-asserted: (1) the ACED clean-suite scenario's Given widened from six criteria to eight, which otherwise certifies a suite clean without checking either new criterion; (2) the producer's reports-complete Given qualified to exclude an entangled Given and an unregisterable miss. The second narrowing resolves a contradiction that PREDATES this CR — the frozen entangled-Given scenario already gave the opposite verdict to reports-complete on one snapshot; the new pairwise rule is what surfaced it. Cold spec-judge round 1 returned needs-input on both narrowings plus a procedural/single-brancher coverage gap; all addressed before this line.
